name: 请叫我英雄
publisher: 深圳不平行宇宙传媒文化有限公司
short_description: Players will transform into the male protagonist Lin Feng, meet three beautiful women with vastly different appearances and personalities, and embark on an exciting love journey with them, becoming their heroes in the process.
detailed_description:
This is a brand new interactive storyline exploration game!
This game breaks through bold innovation and will integrate multiple excellent gameplay elements!

The user transforms into the male protagonist Lin Feng and meets three beautiful women with vastly different appearances and personalities, embarking on an exciting love journey with them. During the process, they become their heroes in one fell swoop.

Based on this, we plan to add more gameplay to make a linear storyline game as "more free" as possible!
